headline: 90 Top Ten-Year Dog Collection Yields 22 Ideal Buys From 41 'Safer' Sorts In May
summary: Projected net gains for the top ten dividend dogs range from 22.07% to 68.09% by May 2027. Check out 22 safer stocks where $1K in dividends exceeds share price.
